name: Chinese Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; then let cool.
2. Gradually add the cooled water to the powdered mustard, stirring in small amounts until fully incorporated.
3. Slowly incorporate white wine into the mustard mixture until it becomes smooth and thin.
4. Add sesame oil and mix well with the mustard.
5. Keep refrigerated in a tightly capped jar.
Notes: Continue stirring the mustard until it reaches your desired level of heat. The longer you stir, the hotter it will become.
